description: Use alongside SDR++/SDR Console during active listening sessions. Shows what's active, what to tune to, and what needs identification. Reads from the spectrum scanner's ClickHouse data.

panels.title: Tune To These
panels.description: Most interesting frequencies right now, ranked by unusual activity, burstiness, and signal strength. Based on latest full sweep vs 24h history.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1), latest_data AS (SELECT round(freq_hz / 100000) * 100000 AS freq_bin, freq_hz, power_dbfs FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest)), history AS (SELECT round(freq_hz / 100000) * 100000 AS freq_bin, avg(power_dbfs) AS historical_avg, stddevPop(power_dbfs) AS historical_std, countIf(power_dbfs > -40) * 100.0 / count() AS activity_pct FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY freq_bin), kf_lookup AS (SELECT l.freq_hz, max(k.name) AS kf_name, max(k.modulation) AS kf_modulation FROM latest_data l CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies k WHERE abs(toInt64(l.freq_hz) - toInt64(k.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(k.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) GROUP BY l.freq_hz) SELECT round(l.freq_hz / 1000000, 3) AS freq_mhz, round(l.power_dbfs, 1) AS current_power, round(h.historical_avg, 1) AS avg_24h, round(l.power_dbfs - h.historical_avg, 1) AS above_normal, round(h.activity_pct, 0) AS activity_pct_24h, CASE WHEN m.kf_name IS NOT NULL THEN m.kf_name WHEN l.freq_hz BETWEEN 118000000 AND 137000000 THEN 'Airband (unidentified)' WHEN l.freq_hz BETWEEN 137000000 AND 156000000 THEN 'VHF Gov/Business' WHEN l.freq_hz BETWEEN 156000000 AND 163000000 THEN 'Marine VHF' WHEN l.freq_hz BETWEEN 163000000 AND 170000000 THEN 'Land Mobile' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS likely_id, CASE WHEN m.kf_modulation IS NOT NULL THEN m.kf_modulation WHEN l.freq_hz BETWEEN 118000000 AND 137000000 THEN 'AM' ELSE 'NFM' END AS mode, CASE WHEN l.power_dbfs - h.historical_avg > 10 THEN 'UNUSUAL' WHEN l.power_dbfs > -15 THEN 'STRONG' WHEN h.activity_pct > 80 THEN 'ALWAYS ON' WHEN h.historical_std > 5 THEN 'BURSTY' ELSE '' END AS status FROM latest_data l JOIN history h ON l.freq_bin = h.freq_bin LEFT JOIN kf_lookup m ON l.freq_hz = m.freq_hz WHERE l.power_dbfs > -40 AND l.freq_hz NOT BETWEEN 174000000 AND 230000000 AND l.freq_hz NOT BETWEEN 88000000 AND 108000000 ORDER BY CASE WHEN l.power_dbfs - h.historical_avg > 10 THEN 0 WHEN h.historical_std > 5 THEN 1 WHEN l.power_dbfs > -15 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, l.power_dbfs DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Quick Frequency Guide
panels.description: Key Athens frequencies and what mode to use in your SDR software.

targets.rawSql: SELECT name, round(freq_hz / 1000000, 3) AS freq_mhz, modulation AS mode, category, notes FROM spectrum.known_frequencies WHERE category IN ('airband', 'marine', 'gov', 'business') ORDER BY CASE category WHEN 'airband' THEN 1 WHEN 'marine' THEN 2 WHEN 'gov' THEN 3 WHEN 'business' THEN 4 END, freq_hz

panels.title: Signal Logger
panels.description: Log what you hear. Submits directly to ClickHouse.

options.content: Log Signal

panels.title: Listening Log
panels.description: Recent signal identifications from monitoring sessions.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp, freq_mhz, mode, signal_type, heard, language, notes FROM spectrum.listening_log ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Last Hour — Signal Activity
panels.description: Max power per minute for key signal groups. Shows what's been happening while you set up.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, maxIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 118000000 AND 122000000) AS ATC, maxIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 146000000 AND 153000000) AS Military_VHF, maxIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 156000000 AND 163000000) AS Marine, maxIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 164000000 AND 170000000) AS Land_Mobile FROM spectrum.scans WHERE (sweep_id LIKE 'airband:%' OR sweep_id LIKE 'full:%') AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Burst Radar — Last 30 min
panels.description: Signals that just spiked — active voice traffic, dispatch, or new transmissions. These are the most interesting things to tune to.

targets.rawSql: WITH kf_lookup AS (SELECT DISTINCT e.freq_hz, max(k.name) AS kf_name FROM spectrum.events e CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies k WHERE abs(toInt64(e.freq_hz) - toInt64(k.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(k.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND e.event_type = 'appeared' AND e.timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE GROUP BY e.freq_hz) SELECT e.timestamp, round(e.freq_hz / 1000000, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(e.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(e.prev_power, 1) AS was, round(e.delta_db, 1) AS jump_db, ifNull(m.kf_name, 'Unknown') AS signal_name, CASE WHEN e.freq_hz BETWEEN 118000000 AND 137000000 THEN 'AM' ELSE 'NFM' END AS tune_mode FROM spectrum.events e LEFT JOIN kf_lookup m ON e.freq_hz = m.freq_hz WHERE e.event_type = 'appeared' AND e.timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE ORDER BY e.timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Airband Status
panels.description: Current airband conditions: ATIS presence and ATC burst activity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'ATIS' AS signal, ifNull(round(max(power_dbfs), 1), -99) AS current_power, CASE WHEN max(power_dbfs) > -48 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'QUIET' END AS status FROM spectrum.scans WHERE freq_hz BETWEEN 136000000 AND 136300000 AND (sweep_id LIKE 'airband:%' OR sweep_id LIKE 'full:%') AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE UNION ALL SELECT 'ATC Bursts (15m)' AS signal, toFloat64(count()) AS current_power, CASE WHEN count() > 5 THEN 'BUSY' WHEN count() > 0 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'QUIET' END AS status FROM spectrum.events WHERE freq_hz BETWEEN 118000000 AND 137000000 AND event_type = 'appeared' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

panels.title: Marine Status
panels.description: Current marine band conditions: Ch16, AIS, and marine burst activity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Ch16 Distress' AS signal, ifNull(round(max(power_dbfs), 1), -99) AS current_power, CASE WHEN max(power_dbfs) > -48 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'QUIET' END AS status FROM spectrum.scans WHERE freq_hz BETWEEN 156700000 AND 156900000 AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE UNION ALL SELECT 'Marine Bursts (15m)' AS signal, toFloat64(count()) AS current_power, CASE WHEN count() > 5 THEN 'BUSY' WHEN count() > 0 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'QUIET' END AS status FROM spectrum.events WHERE freq_hz BETWEEN 156000000 AND 163000000 AND event_type = 'appeared' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE UNION ALL SELECT 'AIS' AS signal, ifNull(round(max(power_dbfs), 1), -99) AS current_power, CASE WHEN max(power_dbfs) > -45 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'QUIET' END AS status FROM spectrum.scans WHERE freq_hz BETWEEN 161900000 AND 162100000 AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

panels.title: Mystery Signals
panels.description: Strong unidentified signals (> -30 dBFS) not in the known_frequencies table. Tune in and identify!

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1), kf_match AS (SELECT DISTINCT s.freq_hz FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies k WHERE s.sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest) AND abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(k.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(k.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000))) SELECT round(s.freq_hz / 1000000, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(s.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, 'NFM' AS try_mode FROM spectrum.scans s WHERE s.sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest) AND s.freq_hz NOT IN (SELECT freq_hz FROM kf_match) AND s.power_dbfs > -30 AND s.freq_hz NOT BETWEEN 174000000 AND 230000000 AND s.freq_hz NOT BETWEEN 88000000 AND 108000000 ORDER BY s.power_dbfs DESC LIMIT 10

title: Listening Playbook
